narrative:
Olmsted Falls-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 893 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.9 percentage points.
